garde: Wipe down cutting boards (bleach every few days)
grill_saute: Shut off all equip. (hot well, ovens range, grills)
house: Shut off steam well, grill, fryer, and oven
Wipe down stainless surfaces, cutting boards
Wash and put away dishes. Drain dishwasher
sweep and mop floor. Empty mop bucket
shut of gas line to wok station
check all closing procedures have been done
double check all closing procedures have been done
